headline: Could Kraft Heinz’s NFL Push and Healthier Mac & Cheese Redefine Its Brand Narrative for KHC?
summary: In recent weeks, Kraft Heinz held now-concluded talks with Unilever about merging parts of their food businesses, while also announcing a five-year global condiment partnership with the NFL and launching PowerMac, a higher-protein, higher-fiber version of Kraft Mac & Cheese set to reach major US retailers from April 2026. Together, these moves highlight Kraft Heinz’s attempt to refresh its portfolio and brand relevance through health-oriented innovation, sports-led marketing, and previously...
